source: amitanalysis/report.pdf — 'Kimi 2026 World Cup Analysis & Prediction Report' (277pp, AI-generated, 8-source ensemble + 100k MC, as of 2026-06-05)
trust: Top-team probabilities + per-team/group qualitative analysis are well-calibrated (track market & Groll/Zeileis). KNOWN DEFECTS: Table 8.1 tail (ranks 18-48) lists phantom teams NOT in the actual draw (Denmark, Poland, Ukraine, Cameroon, Costa Rica, Wales, Serbia, Honduras, Indonesia) — stale/hallucinated; ignore the tail. Group chapter (Ch4) uses the CORRECT actual draw.
most_likely_final: Spain vs Argentina (~5.3% joint) — report's #1 final pairing (note: report assumes ESP & FRA share a half; the repo bracket that scores this game puts H1 left & I1 right = opposite halves, so an ESP-FRA final IS valid here).

group_finish_example_A.note: Report group tables sourced from Opta Supercomputer + ESPN Strength Index. Format = 1st/2nd/3rd/qualify per team.

specials_signals.top_scorer: No global Golden-Boot ranking in report. Per-team: Mbappé (42 G / 44 matches Real Madrid, UCL Golden Boot) = elite; Yamal (24G+17A season, but winger); Kane (78 G / 112 caps); Haaland (Norway, prolific). Report is BEARISH on Oyarzabal: 'Spain lacks a 30+ goal striker; Oyarzabal ~0.35 G/game; absence of a Kane/Mbappé-grade finisher is Spain's fatal weakness.' BUT market rates Oyarzabal +1400 joint-3rd (penalty taker + Euro 2024 final scorer) — divergence to resolve.
specials_signals.best_attack: Spain attack 'balanced but lacks a finisher'; France = 'forward nuclear arsenal' (Mbappé+Dembélé). Market makes Spain best-attack favorite +300.
specials_signals.dirtiest_team: Argentina (Amit's pick) — physical/aggressive; check discipline section. Report doesn't give a cards ranking explicitly here.
specials_signals.penalties: Section 5.3.2 'Penalty Shootouts: The Ultimate Variance Compressor' — expanded 48-team KO (extra R32 round) raises total knockout matches → more shootout exposure (supports OVER).

key_team_notes.ESP: Champion favorite 16.5%. Core Rodri/Pedri/Yamal. Risk: Yamal hamstring; no elite striker. 33-match unbeaten (may contain luck).
key_team_notes.FRA: 15.0%. Mbappé+Dembélé pace arsenal; L'Equipe reports Mbappé-teammate tensions; lost 2-1 to Ivory Coast friendly 4 Jun.
key_team_notes.ARG: 12.0%, +0.9 vs market (mild underdog value). Title-defence curse + Messi age 38 / Otamendi 38 = 'time tax'. Highest SF prob bracket dividend (Pathway 2).
key_team_notes.ENG: 11.0% but market 14.3% (model -3.3, biggest disagreement; Goldman Sachs only 5.0% w/ geographic penalty). Tuchel + Kane.
key_team_notes.GER: 11.0%, +3.6 vs market (model thinks market underrates Nagelsmann system; Musiala/Wirtz).
key_team_notes.BRA: 9.0%, -2.1 ('Ancelotti premium'); squad age 28.6 vs golden window 26.9; Rodrygo ACL, Militão hamstring, Neymar calf injuries.
key_team_notes.POR: 7.0%. Ronaldo age-41 role question vs Bruno/Bernardo creativity. Bruno Fernandes elite assists.
key_team_notes.NED: 4.0%. De Jong recovery a swing factor; Depay ageing.
